To address this challenge, we propose CMDR-Embed, a contextual multimodal embedding framework that explicitly incorporates document context by jointly encoding multiple pages and deriving page-level embeddings from a shared contextual representation. Furthermore, we introduce CMCL, a contextual multimodal contrastive learning objective that effectively trains CMDR-Embed by balancing contextual modeling with page-level discriminability. Experiments demonstrate that CMDR-Embed significantly outperforms non-contextual embeddings, highlighting the importance of context-aware multimodal embeddings for advancing document retrieval.
articles.comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026; project page: https://cmdr-bench.github.io/
articles.titleCn: CMDR：情境多模态文档检索
articles.abstractCn: 多模态文档检索旨在在检索相关页面的同时保留原始文档中的文本和视觉内容。然而，现有的基准主要评估简单的词汇或语义匹配，并且大多数方法独立地对页面进行编码。因此，它们忽略了文档中所需的上下文信息，以解决跨多页聚合信息的查询。在本文中，我们引入了CMDR和CMDR-Bench，这是一个需要建模文档上下文的新多模态文档检索任务和基准。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了CMDR-Embed，一个上下文多模态嵌入框架，该框架通过联合编码多个页面并从共享的上下文表示中推导出页面级嵌入，显式地结合文档上下文。此外，我们引入了CMCL，一个上下文多模态对比学习目标，它通过平衡上下文建模与页面级区分性有效地训练CMDR-Embed。实验表明，CMDR-Embed显著优于非上下文嵌入，突显了上下文感知多模态嵌入在推进文档检索方面的重要性。

articles.title: PolicyShiftGuard: Benchmarking and Improving Policy-Adaptive Image Guardrails
articles.abstract: Image guardrails are typically trained and evaluated under a fixed safety policy, implicitly treating safety as an intrinsic property of an image. Real deployments are different: the same image may be allowed in one product, restricted in another, and newly disallowed when a policy boundary changes. We study policy-adaptive image guardrailing, where a model must decide whether an image violates the currently supplied policy and generalize to held-out policy definitions. We introduce PolicyShiftBench, a comprehensive benchmark with 2,000 policy-discriminative instances over 265 images, where each image is paired with 7.55 policy-conditioned prompts on average to test whether models adapt to the active policy rather than relying on image-level safety priors. We then propose PolicyShiftGuard, a compact policy-conditioned guardrail trained with a two-stage training recipe that combines Randomized Policy SFT (RP-SFT) with Boundary-Pair Policy Adaptation (BP-Adapt). BP-Adapt trains matched prompts for the same image and risk category using standard label supervision and a pairwise comparison loss that separates blocking policies from passing policies. Experiments show that existing VLMs and specialized guardrails remain brittle under policy shifts, while PolicyShiftGuard substantially improves policy-sensitive performance. The 7B model achieves SOTA performance of 76.9 Avg. F1 and 72.1 Avg. PSS on PolicyShiftBench, transfers well to UnSafeBench and SafeEditBench, and improves the latency-performance trade-off with a concise output format. Ablations confirm that matched pass/block boundary pairs are essential for stable policy adaptation.
articles.titleCn: PolicyShiftGuard：基准测试与改进策略自适应图像护栏
articles.abstractCn: 图像护栏通常在固定的安全策略下进行训练和评估，隐式地将安全性视为图像的内在属性。实际部署情况则不同：同一张图像在一个产品中可能被允许，在另一个产品中被限制，当策略边界发生变化时可能被新禁止。我们研究了策略自适应图像护栏，其中模型必须判断图像是否违反当前提供的策略，并能泛化到未知的策略定义。我们引入了PolicyShiftBench，这是一个全面的基准，包含265张图像上的2000个策略区分实例，平均每张图像配有7.55个策略条件提示，以测试模型是否适应当前策略而非依赖图像级别的安全先验。然后我们提出了PolicyShiftGuard，这是一种紧凑的策略条件护栏，采用两阶段训练方法，结合随机策略微调（RP-SFT）与边界对策略适应（BP-Adapt）。BP-Adapt使用标准标签监督和分离禁止策略与通过策略的成对比较损失，为同一图像和风险类别训练匹配提示。实验表明，现有视觉语言模型（VLMs）和专用护栏在策略变化下仍然脆弱，而PolicyShiftGuard显著提高了策略敏感性能。7B模型在PolicyShiftBench上实现了76.9平均F1和72.1平均PSS的SOTA性能，能够很好地迁移到UnSafeBench和SafeEditBench，并通过简洁的输出格式改善了延迟-性能权衡。消融实验证实，匹配的通过/禁止边界对对于稳定的策略适应至关重要。

articles.title: K-ABENA: K-Adaptive Backpropagation with Error-based N-exclusion Algorithm : (Compensated Loss-Based Sample Exclusion with Unbiased Gradient Estimation)
articles.abstract: We present K-ABENA (K-Adaptive Backpropagation with Error-based N-exclusion Algorithm), a selective gradient computation framework that reduces per-iteration training cost by excluding a fraction of low-loss ("minor") observations from the backward pass. Its canonical form (v3) combines a defensive-mixture sampling design over the minor set with Horvitz-Thompson inverse-probability reweighting, yielding a design-unbiased Horvitz-Thompson gradient estimator (Lemma 2) and whose self-normalized practical variant carries a bias of order O(1/m) with an explicit constant (Lemma 3). We prove an O(1/sqrt(T)) non-convex convergence guarantee for SGD under the estimator, with an additive term that quantifies the residual bias (Theorem 1). We further prove that uncompensated loss-based selection - a family that includes OHEM, SBP, and the two earlier K-ABENA variants - admits no stationary point at any minimizer where its selection bias is bounded away from zero (Proposition 2), and we quantify this failure empirically: at 0.17% class imbalance, uncompensated variants reach test AUC 0.53-0.62 versus 0.9998 for full-batch SGD, while the compensated estimator attains 0.9991 at identical 28.4% compute savings. On real datasets (Breast Cancer, Digits, Wine, Diabetes) the compensated estimator is statistically indistinguishable from full-batch SGD (paired permutation tests, p >= 0.5; Section 7) while saving 28-54% of per-epoch gradient computation. A biased "regularized mode" (the earlier half-domain variant) is retained as an option with a proven exact bias decomposition (Lemma 5) and quantified contraindications: it collapses to 0.386 accuracy under 40% label noise (baseline: 0.832) and to 0.53 AUC under extreme imbalance. Every advantage and every limitation reported in this paper is either proved or measured; all experiments are CPU-scale (NumPy/scikit-learn) and their scope is stated explicitly.
articles.comment: 11 pages main text + appendices, 13 pages total. Code: https://github.com/Bonbhel/kabena-ml
articles.titleCn: K-ABENA：基于误差的N-排除算法的K-自适应反向传播（基于补偿损失的样本排除与无偏梯度估计）
articles.abstractCn: 我们提出了K-ABENA（K-自适应反向传播结合基于误差的N-排除算法），这是一种选择性梯度计算框架，通过从反向传播中排除一部分低损失（“次要”）观测值来降低每轮训练成本。其标准形式（v3）结合了对次要集合的防御性混合采样设计与霍维茨-汤普森逆概率重新加权，产生了一个设计无偏的霍维茨-汤普森梯度估计器（引理2），其自归一化的实用变体具有O(1/m)阶偏差和显式常数（引理3）。我们证明了在估计器下，SGD具有O(1/√T)的非凸收敛保证，其中附加项量化了残差偏差（定理1）。我们进一步证明了无补偿损失选择——包括OHEM、SBP以及之前的两个K-ABENA变体——在任何其选择偏差远离零的最小化点处都不存在稳定点（命题2），并实证量化了这一缺陷：在0.17%的类别不平衡情况下，无补偿变体达到测试AUC 0.53-0.62，而全批次SGD为0.9998，而补偿估计器在相同的28.4%计算节省下达到0.9991。在真实数据集（乳腺癌、数字、葡萄酒、糖尿病）上，补偿估计器在全批次SGD上统计上无显著差异（配对置换检验，p >= 0.5；第7节），同时每轮梯度计算节省28-54%。一个有偏的“正则化模式”（之前的半域变体）被保留为选项，具有已证明的精确偏差分解（引理5）和量化限制：在40%标签噪声下，它降至0.386准确率（基线：0.832），在极端不平衡下降至0.53 AUC。本文报告的所有优势和局限性都是经过证明或测量的；所有实验均为CPU规模（NumPy/scikit-learn），其范围明确说明。

articles.title: Mitigating Factual Hallucination in Large Reasoning Models via Mixed-Mode Advantage Regularization
articles.abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) improve language model capabilities by generating explicit thinking traces before final answers. In factuality-oriented question answering (QA), such thinking often improves overall performance by helping the model recover relevant knowledge and refine its answers. However, we find that this benefit is not uniform at the instance level: explicit thinking can also overturn correct non-thinking answers and lead to factual drift. We refer to this failure mode as \emph{thinking-induced hallucination}. To explain this phenomenon, we formulate explicit thinking in factuality QA as a thinking residual over the model's direct-answer tendency, which can either recover missing knowledge or introduce unsupported associations. Based on this formulation, we propose MARGO, \underline{\textit{M}}ixed-Mode \underline{\textit{A}}dvantage \underline{\textit{R}}egularization for \underline{\textit{G}}rounded \underline{\textit{O}}ptimization, a reinforcement learning framework that uses non-thinking rollouts as same-model references in advantage estimation. By constructing mixed-mode rollout groups with both thinking and non-thinking trajectories, MARGO evaluates whether explicit thinking adds factual value beyond direct answering, thereby suppressing hallucination-prone thinking while preserving beneficial thinking behaviors. Experiments across multiple factuality-oriented QA benchmarks demonstrate that MARGO improves factual reliability over strong baselines, while evaluations on mathematical benchmarks show that it preserves general reasoning ability.
articles.titleCn: 通过混合模式优势正则化减轻大型推理模型的事实性幻觉
articles.abstractCn: 大型推理模型（LRMs）通过在最终答案之前生成明确的推理轨迹来提升语言模型的能力。在事实性问答（QA）中，这种推理往往通过帮助模型恢复相关知识并优化答案来提高整体性能。然而，我们发现这种优势在实例层面并非一致：明确的推理也可能推翻正确的非推理答案，导致事实性偏差。我们将这种失败模式称为\emph{推理诱导的幻觉}。为了解释这一现象，我们将事实性问答中的明确推理表述为模型直接回答倾向上的推理残差，这种残差既能恢复缺失的知识，也可能引入未经支持的联系。基于这一表述，我们提出了MARGO，即\textit{混合模式} \textit{优势} \textit{正则化}用于\textit{事实性} \textit{优化}，这是一种强化学习框架，在优势估计中使用非推理轨迹作为同模型参考。通过构建包含推理和非推理轨迹的混合模式轨迹组，MARGO评估明确推理在直接回答之外的客观价值，从而抑制易导致幻觉的推理行为，同时保留有益的推理行为。在多个事实性问答基准上的实验表明，MARGO在强基线之上提高了事实可靠性，而在数学基准上的评估则显示其保留了通用推理能力。

articles.title: CoPiT: Cognitive Pivot Translation for Digraphic Low-Resource Mongolian in the Traditional Script
articles.abstract: Low-resource languages remain challenging for machine translation, and Mongolian is a representative case. As a digraphic language, Mongolian is written in both Cyrillic and Traditional scripts, which exhibit a severe imbalance in data availability. While the Cyrillic script is relatively well-resourced, the Traditional script remains extremely data-scarce and orthographically ambiguous, leading to substantial performance degradation in direct translation. We propose CoPiT, a cognitively motivated pivot-based translation pipeline that exploits this internal resource hierarchy by routing translation through the Cyrillic script. The pipeline explicitly resolves script-induced ambiguity in the Traditional script before translation, enabling more stable and accurate meaning transfer. Across multiple backbone models and target languages, CoPiT consistently outperforms direct translation, achieving substantial absolute BLEU improvements together with consistent 1.5-1.6x COMET gains. These gains allow strong open-source models to match or outperform GPT-4.1 under comparable evaluation settings. Beyond inference-time improvements, CoPiT enables the construction of synthetic parallel data directly from Traditional-script text, mitigating data scarcity in realistic low-resource scenarios. We release a new multi-script parallel dataset covering Mongolian in both scripts alongside English, Korean, and Russian. All datasets and code are publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/anonymous_project-76C7.
articles.titleCn: CoPiT：传统蒙古文低资源双文认知转换翻译
articles.abstractCn: 低资源语言对机器翻译仍然是一个挑战，蒙古语是一个典型的例子。作为一种双文语言，蒙古语使用西里尔字母和传统字母两种书写系统，这两种系统的数据可用性存在严重不平衡。虽然西里尔字母系统相对资源丰富，但传统字母系统仍然极度缺乏数据且存在正字法模糊性，导致直接翻译性能大幅下降。我们提出了CoPiT，这是一个基于认知动机的枢纽翻译管道，通过通过西里尔字母系统来利用这种内部资源层级。该管道在翻译前明确解决传统字母系统中的字母系统引起的歧义，从而实现更稳定和准确的意义传递。在多个骨干模型和目标语言中，CoPiT始终优于直接翻译，实现了显著的绝对BLEU提升，并保持1.5-1.6倍的COMET增益。这些提升使得强大的开源模型能够在相似的评估设置下与或优于GPT-4.1。除了推理时的改进，CoPiT能够直接从传统字母文本中构建合成平行数据，缓解现实低资源场景中的数据稀缺问题。我们发布了一个新的多字母平行数据集，涵盖英语、韩语和俄语，以及使用两种字母系统的蒙古语。所有数据集和代码均可在https://anonymous.4open.science/r/anonymous_project-76C7公开获取。

articles.title: StateFuse: Deterministic Conflict-Preserving Memory for Multi-Agent Systems
articles.abstract: Agent systems accumulate conflicting observations across branches, retries, and replicas, yet many practical memory layers still collapse disagreement behind overwrite rules that are difficult to inspect or correct. We present StateFuse, a conflict-aware replicated memory contract built on standard OpSet/CRDT merge. StateFuse does not introduce a new join algebra; it defines an agent-facing semantics layer with immutable history, explicit conflict objects, exact and semantic correction handles (claim_id / claim_ref), deterministic predicate contracts, and projection-time resolution that cannot rewrite replicated state. We evaluate StateFuse against flat multi-value, raw-log, provenance-style, and collapsed baselines under matched resolver and verification policies. On a 282-question official conflict-bearing MemoryAgentBench slice, the compared methods tie on answer accuracy, but conflict-preserving surfaces keep contradictions visible while collapsed surfaces do not. In a controlled agent loop with uniform verification, preserving ambiguity enables safer abstention and correction than early collapse. A correction-handle ablation further shows that semantic handles matter when exact prior identifiers are unavailable. The resulting claim is narrow: StateFuse is best supported as a safer public memory contract for contradiction surfacing, abstention, and auditable correction, not as a universal accuracy gain.
articles.comment: Code and supplementary materials available at: https://github.com/nZiben/statefuse
articles.titleCn: StateFuse：面向多智能体系统的确定性冲突保留内存
articles.abstractCn: 代理系统会在分支、重试和副本中累积冲突性观察结果，然而许多实际内存层仍然通过难以检查或纠正的覆盖规则来消除分歧。我们提出了StateFuse，一种基于标准OpSet/CRDT合并构建的、具有冲突感知的复制内存契约。StateFuse没有引入新的连接代数；它定义了一个面向代理的语义层，具有不可变历史记录、显式的冲突对象、精确和语义修正句柄（claim_id / claim_ref）、确定性谓词契约以及投影时决议，后者不会重写复制状态。我们在匹配的解析器和验证策略下，对比了扁平多值、原始日志、溯源式和折叠基线。在一个包含282个问题的官方冲突性MemoryAgentBench切片上，比较方法在答案准确率上打成平手，但冲突保留表面能保持矛盾可见，而折叠表面则不能。在一个受控的代理循环中，通过保留模糊性，比早期折叠更能实现更安全的弃权与修正。修正句柄的消融实验进一步表明，当精确先验标识符不可用时，语义句柄很重要。最终结论是：StateFuse最适合作为一种更安全的公共内存契约，用于矛盾表面化、弃权和可审计修正，而不是作为普遍提高准确性的方案。

articles.title: TurnOPD: Making On-Policy Distillation Turn-Aware for Efficient Long-Horizon Agent Training
articles.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student policy by matching a stronger teacher on the student's own trajectories, offering a promising framework for language agent training. However, its application to long-horizon agentic tasks remains insufficiently explored. We identify two key inefficiencies in vanilla agent OPD: (1) full-horizon rollouts often waste wall-clock resources on tail turns that provide weak and noisy KL supervision, and (2) trajectory-level KL objectives concentrate most of the loss on shallow tokens, leaving deeper decision turns under-trained once initial behaviors are aligned. To address these challenges, we propose TurnOPD, a turn-level budgeting strategy for efficient on-policy distillation of long-horizon agents. TurnOPD consists of two budget controllers: adaptive rollout-depth budgeting, which uses probe-based turn statistics to determine rollout length, and progressive turn-normalized loss budgeting, which gradually shifts KL weighting from token-level to turn-balanced supervision. Experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and Multi-Hop Search with task-specialized teacher models show that TurnOPD achieves superior validation accuracy under equal wall-clock training budgets and advances the accuracy--time frontier beyond vanilla OPD.
articles.titleCn: TurnOPD：使在线策略蒸馏具备转向感知能力，以实现高效长时程智能体训练
articles.abstractCn: 策略内蒸馏（OPD）通过在学生策略自身的轨迹上匹配一个更强的教师策略来训练学生策略，为语言智能体训练提供了一个有前景的框架。然而，将其应用于长时程智能体任务的研究仍显不足。我们识别出在普通智能体OPD中的两个关键低效问题：(1) 全时程回滚常常浪费墙上时间资源在提供弱噪声KL监督的尾部转换上；(2) 轨迹级KL目标将大部分损失集中在浅层标记上，导致初始行为对齐后，深层决策转换训练不足。为解决这些挑战，我们提出了TurnOPD，一种用于长时程智能体高效策略内蒸馏的回合级预算策略。TurnOPD包含两个预算控制器：自适应回滚深度预算，它使用基于探针的回合统计数据来确定回滚长度；渐进式回合归一化损失预算，它逐渐将KL权重从标记级转移到回合平衡监督。在ALFWorld、WebShop和Multi-Hop Search任务上使用任务专用教师模型的实验表明，TurnOPD在相同的墙上时间训练预算下实现了更优的验证准确率，并将准确率-时间前沿推进到普通OPD之外。

articles.title: Inject or Navigate? Token-Efficient Retrieval for LLM Analysis of Transactional Legal Documents
articles.abstract: Answering questions over a set of transactional legal documents is most simply done by injecting the whole corpus into the LLM's context window on every query. That baseline maximises retrieval recall, but its token footprint scales with the corpus rather than the question, and long-context degradation scales with it. We report what it took to replace full-corpus injection in a legal-document analysis system, comparing it against two structured retrieval modes over our proprietary structure-aware chunking: embedding retrieval (NAVEMBED) and LLM navigation over a compact structured index (NAVINDEX). On a 20-question benchmark with verified ground-truth answers, a position-bias-controlled, reference-anchored pairwise judge scored semantic retrieval with reranking tied with injection on 16 of 18 document-bound questions (injection preferred on 2) while attending to 17.3x fewer input tokens (a general-text-embedding (GTE) configuration reaches 29.9x at a lower tie rate); both modes were judged tied on the 2 out-of-scope controls. NAVINDEX was judged tied on all 18 at a 1.61x smaller total token footprint, a ~56x smaller answering context, and 25% lower dollar cost. We derive a closed-form caching-crossover rule: cached injection is cheaper in dollars only while the corpus stays below roughly ten times the retrieval payload. Scope and uncertainty are quantified in Section 8.
articles.titleCn: 注入或导航？面向LLM分析交易性法律文档的Token高效检索
articles.abstractCn: 在交易性法律文件集合上回答问题最简单的方法是将整个语料库在每次查询时注入到LLM的上下文窗口中。这种基线方法最大化了检索召回率，但其token占用规模与语料库成正比，而非与问题成正比，长上下文退化也随之增加。我们报告了在法律文件分析系统中替换完整语料库注入所需的工作，并将其与两种基于专有结构感知分块的结构化检索模式进行了比较：嵌入检索（NAVEMBED）和LLM在紧凑结构化索引上的导航（NAVINDEX）。在一个包含20个问题的基准测试中，使用经过验证的ground-truth答案，一个受位置偏差控制、以参考锚定的成对评分者发现，在18个与文档相关的18个问题中，语义检索重排序与注入在16个问题中得分相同（注入在2个问题中得分更高），同时输入token减少了17.3倍（通用文本嵌入（GTE）配置在较低平局率下达到了29.9倍）；两种模式在2个超出范围的控制问题中得分相同。NAVINDEX在总token占用规模小1.61倍、回答上下文小约56倍、美元成本低25%的情况下，在所有18个问题中得分相同。我们推导出了一种封闭形式的缓存交叉规则：只有在语料库保持在检索负载的大约十倍以下时，缓存的注入才更经济。范围和不确定性在第八节中进行量化。

articles.title: When Should LLMs Search? Counterfactual Supervision for Search Routing
articles.abstract: Search-augmented language models can use external evidence to compensate for limitations in parametric knowledge, but search is not uniformly beneficial: models may call search for questions they can already answer, or rely on noisy evidence when correction, clarification, or abstention would be more appropriate. We formulate this as an instance-level search-routing problem: deciding whether search is needed to improve task success relative to a no-search execution. To derive supervision, we compare no-search and forced-search outcomes for the same question and construct an oracle over NO SEARCH, SEARCH, and UNSOLVED based on task-specific success. Using this oracle as both an evaluation criterion and a learning signal, we train search-routing policies with supervised fine-tuning and preference optimization, improving routing macro-F1 on oracle-eligible examples from 0.7082 to 0.8235 for Gemma E2B and from 0.7053 to 0.8365 for Qwen3.5-4B. Further analysis shows that the learned policies reduce model-specific routing failures: Gemma primarily learns no-search restraint, while Qwen further reduces missed search; residual UNSOLVED cases reveal heterogeneous bottlenecks involving model capacity, retrieval budget, evidence use, and policy behavior.
articles.comment: 20 pages, 10 figures. Accepted at the FAGEN Workshop at ICML 2026
articles.titleCn: 何时应让大型语言模型进行搜索？用于搜索路由的对比监督
articles.abstractCn: 搜索增强型语言模型可以利用外部证据来弥补参数化知识的局限性，但搜索并非总是有益：模型可能会对已经能够回答的问题进行搜索调用，或者在需要纠正、澄清或拒绝回答时依赖噪声证据。我们将此问题表述为一个实例级别的搜索路由问题：决定是否需要搜索以相对于无搜索执行提高任务成功率。为了获取监督信号，我们比较同一问题的无搜索和强制搜索结果，并根据特定任务的成功率构建一个基于“无搜索”、“搜索”和“未解决”的预言机。使用该预言机作为评估标准和学习信号，我们通过监督微调和偏好优化训练搜索路由策略，将Gemma E2B和Qwen3.5-4B在预言机合格样本上的路由宏观F1从0.7082提升至0.8235，从0.7053提升至0.8365。进一步分析表明，学习到的策略减少了模型特定的路由失败：Gemma主要学习无搜索约束，而Qwen进一步减少了遗漏搜索；残余的“未解决”案例揭示了涉及模型容量、检索预算、证据使用和政策行为的异构瓶颈。

articles.title: Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion: A Tri-Mode Language Model Unifying Autoregressive, Diffusion, and Self-Speculation Decoding
articles.abstract: We introduce Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion, a tri-mode language model (LM) that unifies AR, diffusion, and self-speculation decoding within a single architecture. Trained with a joint AR-diffusion objective, Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion can switch modes to sustain high throughput across deployment settings and concurrency levels. Our study shows that (1) AR and diffusion objectives are complementary: diffusion improves lookahead planning, while AR provides left-to-right linguistic priors. (2) In self-speculation mode, diffusion drafts while AR verifies, outperforming multi-token prediction (MTP) methods in both acceptance rate and real-device efficiency. (3) A speed-of-light analysis further demonstrates diffusion's long-term potential, with up to 76.5% more tokens per forward pass than self-speculation under an optimal sampler. Scaling to 3B, 8B, and 14B parameters, our Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion family, including base, instruct, and vision-language models, consistently outperforms state-of-the-art open-source AR and diffusion LMs in both accuracy and speed. For example, Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-8B decodes 6x more tokens per forward than Qwen3-8B with comparable accuracy, translating to 4x higher throughput on SPEED-Bench with SGLang on a GB200 GPU.
articles.titleCn: Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion：一种统一自回归、扩散和自我推测解码的三模式语言模型
articles.abstractCn: 我们介绍了Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion，一种集成了AR、扩散和自推测解码的三模式语言模型（LM）。在联合AR-扩散目标的训练下，Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion能够在不同的部署环境和并发级别之间切换模式，以维持高吞吐量。我们的研究表明：(1) AR和扩散目标具有互补性：扩散提升了前瞻性规划能力，而AR提供了从左到右的语言先验。(2) 在自推测模式下，扩散负责草拟文本，AR负责验证，在接受率和真实设备效率方面均优于多词预测（MTP）方法。(3) 光速分析进一步证明了扩散的长期潜力，在最优采样器下，其单次前向传递处理的词数比自推测模式高出高达76.5%。扩展到3B、8B和14B参数规模后，我们的Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion系列（包括基础模型、指令模型和视觉语言模型）在准确性和速度方面均持续超越最先进的开源AR和扩散LM。例如，Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion-8B在保持同等准确性的前提下，每轮前向传递解码的词数是Qwen3-8B的6倍，在GB200 GPU上使用SGLang测试时，其吞吐量比Qwen3-8B高出4倍。

articles.title: SpanUQ: Span-Level Uncertainty Quantification for Large Language Model Generation
articles.abstract: Uncertainty estimation is essential not only for the trustworthy deployment of large language models (LLMs) but also as a foundation for self-refinement in LLM generation. However, existing approaches operate at suboptimal granularities: token-level scores lack semantic coherence, while sequence-level scores fail to localize errors. We formalize Span-Level Uncertainty Estimation (SLUE), a new task that targets the natural granularity for uncertainty: semantically coherent text spans, each conveying a single assessable unit of meaning. To address this task, we introduce SPANUQ, a lightweight probe that distills the uncertainty knowledge from expensive multi-sample inference into a single forward pass over LLM hidden states. SPANUQ employs a DETR-style span decoder to simultaneously detect spans and estimate their uncertainty via a Mixture of Beta distribution, trained with a principled combination of Beta NLL regression and contrastive ranking objectives. We construct SPANUQ-BENCH, the first span-level uncertainty benchmark comprising 20K prompts, 293K annotated spans, and continuous soft labels derived from multi-sample claim verification. Experiments on five LLM backbones show that SPANUQ consistently achieves the best span-level uncertainty quality, outperforming the strongest probe baseline and all sampling-based methods while being 10-20x faster. Its DETR-based span detector attains 0.910 F1, surpassing the best heuristic by 39.4%, enabling precise error localization that sequence-level methods cannot provide. The framework generalizes across five LLMs spanning two model families.
articles.comment: The project page is available at https://damon-demon.github.io/SpanUQ.html
articles.titleCn: SpanUQ：针对大型语言模型生成的Span级不确定性量化
articles.abstractCn: 不确定性估计不仅对于大型语言模型（LLM）的可信部署至关重要，也是LLM生成自我完善的基础。然而，现有方法在粒度上存在不足：token级评分缺乏语义连贯性，而序列级评分无法定位错误。我们形式化了跨度级不确定性估计（SLUE），这是一个针对不确定性自然粒度的新任务：语义连贯的文本跨度，每个跨度传达一个可评估的意义单元。为解决此任务，我们引入了SPANUQ，这是一个轻量级探针，将昂贵的多样本推理中的不确定性知识蒸馏为对LLM隐藏状态的单次前向传递。SPANUQ采用DETR风格的跨度解码器，通过Beta分布混合模型同时检测跨度并估计其不确定性，该模型结合了Beta NLL回归和对比排序目标的合理组合进行训练。我们构建了SPANUQ-BENCH，这是首个跨度级不确定性基准，包含20K提示、293K标注跨度以及从多样本声明验证中得出的连续软标签。在五个LLM主干上的实验表明，SPANUQ始终在跨度级不确定性质量上表现最佳，优于最强的探针基线和所有基于采样的方法，同时速度提高了10-20倍。其基于DETR的跨度检测器达到0.910 F1，超越最佳启发式方法39.4%，实现了序列级方法无法提供的精确错误定位。该框架适用于涵盖两个模型系列的五个LLM。
